mapper.insert: insert into batch.trigger_misfire_pending ( trigger_runtime_state_id, tenant_id, job_code, scheduled_fire_time, detected_at, status, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{triggerRuntimeStateId}, #{tenantId}, #{jobCode}, #{scheduledFireTime}, now(), 'PENDING', now() + interval '7 days', now(), now() )
mapper.update: update batch.trigger_misfire_pending set status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'

update batch.trigger_misfire_pending set status = 'REJECTED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = now(), rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'
update batch.trigger_misfire_pending set catch_up_request_id = #{catchUpRequestId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update batch.trigger_misfire_pending set status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = now() where status = 'PENDING' and expires_at < #{now}
